Sport|Olympics

The lineup for the men’s 10m platformdivingcompetition at the 2024Olympicshas been confirmed.

Noah Williams and Kyle Kothari will both be competing forTeam GBafter making it through this morning’s semi-final.

China are once again the nation to beat, having dominated every diving event at these Games.

Tom Daley, who won silver with Williamsin the 10m synchro, is not involved however.

Here is all you need to know in the final event of the diving at theOlympic GamesinParis.

The final is set to begin at The Aquatics Centre at 2pm BST. There are 12 divers who will compete, including Williams and Kothari.

Daley won 10m platform bronze at London and Tokyo, before calling time on his career in the aftermath of the 2020 Games. However, he decided to make himself available for selection in July as he earned a call-up to the 10m synchro team, alongside Noah Williams.

Williams was pencilled in for both the individual and team events but Daley was only available for the synchro, such was the speedy nature of his retirement U-turn.

Teams can only pick two athletes for the individual events and Kyle Kothari was picked for the individual platform alongside Williams.

TV channel:The BBC is broadcasting two live streams of the action for the duration of the Games. This will be on BBC One, BBC Two or a stream available by clicking the red button on Freeview or a smart TV. Coverage of the diving will be across these platforms.

Live stream:Fans can also catch the BBC coverage live online for free via the BBC Sport website and BBC iPlayer. The Discovery+ app is showing extensive coverage via its app, website and on Eurosport, which begins at a monthly fee of £3.99.

Live blog:You can follow all the action viaStandard Sport’srolling live blog, with expert analysis from reporters Matt Majendie and Malik Ouzia out in Paris.

title: Why isn't Tom Daley competing in the 10m diving final? Start time and how to watch Olympic 2024 event | The Standard
author: Marc Mayo
description: Semi-finals and final take place in Paris today
keywords: Tom Daley, Diving, Olympic Games, Paris, Team GB
